{{Quote|I hope you don't mind me asking, but WHERE did you learn to fly those Z-95s like you do? I never knew they could be that effective. What's your secret?|Zed Emmers' e-mail message to Ace Azzameen|<ref name="Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance">''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''</ref>}}
'''Zed Emmers''' was a starfighter pilot who served as [[Cadet/Legends|Cadet 2nd Class]] in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Emmers once sent pilot [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]] an e-mail message praising Ace's skill when flying [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunters]], and asking for him to share his "secret" to flying them.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1stm}}
